article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Feb 6, 2023 (BSS) - Bangladesh Garment Manufacturers and Exporters Association (BGMEA) and SOWTEX along with Confederation of Indian Textile Industries (CITI) have planned two Textile Sourcing Meets'23 and Road Show in India from February 9 to 12.

The event will be led by BGMEA President Faruque Hassan and Vice President Shahidullah Azim along with a team of delegates from Bangladesh RMG Industries.

The BGMEA team is going for close interaction with top Indian Textile Manufacturers in a

llm_connections.evidence_quote: open up additional land ports and ease the congestion in Petrapole-Benapole border and better connectivity via train for smooth flow of raw materials
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly links opening land ports and easing Petrapole-Benapole congestion to ensuring smooth flow of raw materials, which directly concerns logistics performance and port congestion as defined by Delivery.

llm_connections.evidence_quote: The faster lead time and additional quality raw materials from a reliable source like India can help fulfill the demand for the buyers
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article states faster lead times from India help fulfill buyer demand, an explicit effect on order fulfillment and lead-time aspects of logistics covered by the Delivery definition.
